transcript:
Speaker A (AI): क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?]
Speaker B (Human): I roti making.
Speaker A (AI): Roti making नहीं, 'I am making rotis' ऐसा बोलना चाहिए। [Not 'Roti making', you should say 'I am making rotis'.]
Speaker B (Human): मुझे इंग्लिश सिखाओगे? [Will you teach me English?]
Speaker A (AI): बिल्कुल! दिन में मेरे साथ 15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करोगे तो जल्दी इंग्लिश सीख सकते हो। [Of course! If you practice with me for 15 minutes a day, you can learn English quickly.]
Speaker B (Human): लेकिन मेरे पास फीस भरने के लिए पैसे ही नहीं हैं। [But I don't have money to pay the fees.]
Speaker A (AI): चिंता मत करो, आप सिर्फ ₹1 से स्टार्ट कर सकते हो। इसीलिए 1 करोड़ लोग MySivi में मेरे साथ इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। [Don't worry, you can start with just ₹1. That's why 1 crore people are learning English with me on MySivi.]
Speaker B (Human): सुपरब! कैसे ज्वाइन होना है? [Superb! How to join?]
Speaker A (AI): नीचे दिए गए इंस्टॉल बटन को दबाओ, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, अपनी इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, and start your English practice.]
on_screen_text:
KYA KAR [What are you doing]
ROTI
I AM MAKING ROTIS.
AISA [Like this]
MUJHE [Me]
SIKHAOGE? [Will you teach?]
DIN ME MERE SAATH [With me during the day]
MySivi Premium - 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1
AAP SIRF [You only]
ISLIYE EK [That's why one]
CRORE
LOG MYSIVI ME [People in MySivi]
SUPERB.
KAISE JOIN HONA [How to join]
NEECHE [Below]
INSTALL
MYSIVI APP
summary: An AI avatar corrects a woman's English grammar while she is making rotis. The avatar introduces the MySivi app as an affordable way to practice English for just 15 minutes a day, starting at ₹1. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
